creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=624bde48cd1c06c4cfb73982e55b9a6199ce4851

commit 624bde48cd1c06c4cfb73982e55b9a6199ce4851
Author:     Mikael Urankar <mikael@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2023-04-24 16:07:15 +0000
Commit:     Mikael Urankar <mikael@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-04-24 17:50:43 +0000

    lang/rust: always build rustdoc

    Due to a regression in rust [1], rustdoc is not built anymore but
    is required by some ports.
    Force the build of rustdoc.

    [1] https://github.com/rust-lang/rust/commit/11e002a001348e7ea035c0cb2665be806e2a832e

    PR:             271036

 lang/rust/Makefile | 4 ++--
 1 file changed, 2 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)
